body.promql: (sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_b[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) / (sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_a[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) + sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_b[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) + sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_c[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) + sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_d[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) + sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_e[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) + sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_f[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload) + sum(sum_over_time(bkdata:demo_tspider_multi:metric_g[1h])) by (time_partition, location, workload))) * 100
